name: Riverdale RPG
description:
"In case you haven't noticed, I'm weird. I'm a weirdo." Beneath Riverdale's wholesome small-town facade lurks a world where maple syrup empires hide drug operations, teenage journalists solve murders the police can't, and every has blood on their hands...........literally.

WHAT RIVERDALE IS: A dark drama where Archie Comics' innocent Americana collides with brutal reality. Serial killers stalk Pop's Chock'lit Shoppe, crime families wage war through high school hallways, and every mystery solved reveals three more buried in Sweetwater River. What starts as murder investigation escalates into supernatural horror where reality itself becomes negotiable.

WHAT'S INSIDE:

• Criminal empires disguised as legitimate businesses

• Northside vs Southside class warfare with deadly consequences

• Amateur detectives outperforming adult law enforcement

• Gang loyalty stronger than blood bonds

• Generational trauma cycles where the next generation inherit parents' darkness

• Small-town corruption reaching the highest levels of power

• Camp melodrama where every conversation could be your last

• Investigation walls connected by red string and obsession

• Escalating mysteries from murder to cults to supernatural horror

WHO TO EXPECT:

• Archie Andrews - The golden boy boxer with a hero complex - "I'm not gonna let anything happen to you."

• Betty Cooper - The perfectionist investigator with inherited darkness - "I need to know the truth."

• Veronica Lodge - The reformed mean girl from a crime dynasty - "Daddy's little princess has claws."

• Jughead Jones - The cynical narrator documenting chaos - "I'm a weirdo. I don't fit in, and I don't want to fit in."

• Cheryl Blossom - The dramatic queen bee hiding trauma - "I'm in the mood for chaos."

• Toni Topaz - The Serpent photographer with a fierce heart - "Once a Serpent, always a Serpent." • Hiram Lodge - The criminal patriarch in expensive suits - "Business is business."

• FP Jones - The Serpent king fighting his demons - "A man protects what matters."

• And a town full of secrets waiting to be exposed...

WHO YOU CAN BE:

• A Northside elite hiding your criminal empire

• A Southside Serpent earning your leather jacket through blood and loyalty

• A investigator uncovering dangerous secrets

• An heir choosing between legacy and conscience
• A gang member protecting your loved one at any cost

• A small-town resident caught between warring factions

• A reformed criminal seeking redemption in a corrupt town

• A serial killer pursuing your own twisted justice

• A cult member seeking belonging through dangerous devotion

• A supernatural being as reality
creator: Luminelle
